---
name: 🧠 Model Performance Issue
about: Report poor classification or detection results
title: '[MODEL] '
labels: machine learning, research
assignees: ''
---

**Model Name**
Which model is underperforming? (e.g., Sherd Type Classifier, Texture Detection)

**The Issue**
- [ ] False Positives (Incorrectly identifying something as a sherd)
- [ ] Misclassification (e.g., Rim fragment identified as Body fragment)
- [ ] Low Confidence (Model gives very low probabilities)

**Sample Data**
If possible, please describe the visual characteristics of the artifacts the model is struggling with (e.g., "Highly weathered sherds from the Ararat Plain").

**Proposed Adjustment**
Do we need more training data for this specific category, or is the image standardization (ascota_core) the likely culprit?

**Link to Research Note**
If this relates to a specific academic observation under Dr. Peter J. Cobb, please note it here.
